source_pr.title: expression: constraint propagate for '>' and monotonous function
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Propagate some thing like: ``` TO_DAYS(col) < TO_DAYS('2001-01-01') && col > '2009-04-03' => false ``` ### What is changed and how it works? Add a propagate rule `ruleColumnGTConst` leverage this PR https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/7643 Some simple rules: ``` col > c1, col > c2, c1 > c2 => col > c1 col > c1, col < c2, c1 >= c2 => false ``` A more complicate rule: ``` col > c1, f(col) < c2, f is monotonous, f(c1) <= c2 => false ``` Prove: ``` col > c1, f is monotonous => f(col) > f(c1) f(col) > f(c1), f(col) < c2, f(c1) >= c2 => false ``` ### Check List Tests - Unit test Related changes Ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/7516 --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/8640)

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it compared results without enforcing a deterministic order. Collection/iteration order is not guaranteed in all cases, so assertions can be nondeterministic. The fix stabilizes the test by sorting the result slice (e.g., `sort.Strings`) before assertions.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
